channel.title: WorkSmart-AI News
channel.description: 🚀 Suitable for Startups, Small Business, Sass Websites, Professional Portfolios, Marketing Websites, Landing Pages & Blogs.

item.title: Staff AI Skills Training in Higher Education: What Actually Works in 2026
item.description: Here’s a pattern that keeps repeating itself across UK universities right now. The institution rolls out Microsoft Copilot, an AI policy gets drafted, a communication goes out to all staff, and then not much happens.

item.title: Don’t Lose Your Voice to AI
item.description: As a former journalist, I feel very strongly about writing. Being able to write down exactly what I think or feel on a subject is liberating.

item.title: Presenting at AI South-West in Taunton
item.description: Dave and I had a fantastic afternoon at Tech South West’s AI South West Live event in Taunton, speaking with the region’s AI founders, innovators, educators and technologists.

item.title: Removing the Stranger from the Room
item.description: Having recently set up a new company, it’s been fascinating to see how many people are excited for me until I tell them it’s to do with AI.

item.title: What Do We Gain? AI’s Value to the Workforce
item.description: My thoughts this week are inspired by a recent McKinsey report on work partnerships between people, agents and robots, and what AI’s productivity gains mean for the workforce.

item.title: Empowering Universities Through AI Training
item.description: I’ve found myself trying to think of a catchy, accurate tagline for WorkSmart-AI, and kept coming back to one word: empower.

item.title: New HEPI Report: AI and the Future of Universities
item.description: As I write the first blog on behalf of WorkSmart-AI, my attention has been drawn to a new HEPI report on AI and the future of universities.
